content: The linguistic double meaning of 'reflexion' (both the technical AI agent framework and the human cognitive/linguistic concept of reflective learning in English education) reveals that LLM self-reflection mechanisms can be improved by grounding agent self-reflection in structured human reflective writing pedagogy. Just as high school students learn critical thinking by practicing explicit reflective writing to refine their understanding, autonomous Reflexion agents can be fine-tuned on human reflective writing corpora to learn more structured, gap-filling self-critique instead of relying on inconsistent ad-hoc self-evaluation.
